list.title: {repo} policies
list.subtitle: Commit-message rules enforced by the analyzer.
list.rulesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No rules} one {# rule} other {# rules}}

empty.title: No policies yet
empty.description: Create a policy to enforce commit standards on this repository.

error.load: Failed to load policies. Please try again.

create.title: New policy
create.description: Name your policy. You'll configure rules on the next screen.

editor.subtitle: Configure commit-message rules for {repo}.
editor.rulesDescription: Add one rule per commit-message check.
editor.addRuleHelp: Click a card to append that rule. Each kind can be added once.
editor.inactiveHint: This policy is inactive. Activate it to enforce these rules on new commits.
editor.hasErrors: Fix the highlighted rules before saving.

allowedTypes.label: Allowed types
allowedTypes.description: Conventional-commit types accepted for this repository.
allowedTypes.hint: Comma-separated list. At least one type required.

allowedScopes.label: Allowed scopes
allowedScopes.description: Restrict the scope token in the commit subject.
allowedScopes.listHint: Comma-separated list. At least one scope required.

maxSubjectLength.label: Max subject length
maxSubjectLength.description: Maximum characters allowed in the commit subject.

bodyRequired.label: Body required
bodyRequired.description: Commits must include a body separated by a blank line.

footerRequired.label: Footer required
footerRequired.description: Commits must include a footer token (e.g. BREAKING CHANGE, refs #123).

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.

validate.title: Try a commit message
validate.description: Paste a commit message to see how it measures up against the saved rules.
validate.unsavedHint: You have unsaved changes. Validation runs against the last saved version of this policy.
validate.noRules: This policy has no rules, so any message passes.
validate.failedSome: {count, plural, one {# rule failed} few {# rules failed} other {# rules failed}}
validate.errorBody: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.

defaultMessages.allowedTypes: Type isn't in the allowed list.
defaultMessages.allowedScopes: Scope isn't in the allowed list.

toast.deleteError: Failed to delete policy. Active policies must be deactivated first.

delete.title: Delete policy?
delete.description: "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
delete.activeWarning: Active policies cannot be deleted. Activate another policy first.

picker.title: Policies
picker.subtitle: Select a repository to manage its commit-message policies.

empty.title: No repositories connected
empty.description: Connect a repository to configure commit policies.
